title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at B.Braun India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at B.Braun India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? B.Braun India in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!
